description: TB hello-world baseline crashed before agent run due invalid Docker tag with trailing dash

asi.hypothesis: Baseline Terminal-Bench run would expose first pass/fail gap before code optimization.
asi.rollback_reason: benchmark harness crashed before measuring Vis/opencode
asi.next_action_hint: Fix run-terminal-bench-task.sh tag slug generation to avoid trailing dash when side suffix empty, then rerun TB-hello-world.

description: Fix Docker tag slug trimming allowed TB hello-world paired run; both agents passed, but repo lint failed on pre-existing TUI warning

asi.hypothesis: Fixing safe Docker tag generation should unblock Terminal-Bench paired runs.
asi.rollback_reason: autoresearch.checks.sh failed because clj-kondo reported redundant let warning in channel_tui/state.clj.
asi.next_action_hint: Fix or restore the TUI state.clj warning, then reapply Docker tag slug fix and rerun TB-hello-world.
asi.learning: TB-hello-world passes on both opencode and Vis; Vis much slower (162s vs 24s).
